الدليل الفني للرقابة المالية المتقدمة: Technical guide to advanced financial control
علاقة النقاط بالسيولة: The relationship of points to liquidity
كل نقطة مباعة هي التزام مالي بنكي. عند ش: Every point sold is a bank financial liability. When purchasing a “points package,” the liquidity enters the platform (Cash-in), but remains a “virtual debt” until it is consumed or withdrawn.
تعتبر رسوم التوثيق\"ربحاً تشغيلياً مباشر: Documentation fees are considered a 100% “direct operating profit” for the platform, as they are not offset by payment obligations to providers, and contribute to covering costs.
هو الحصاد الفعلي لمجهود المنصة؛ يُحسب من: It is the actual harvest of the platform's effort; It is calculated from the commissions deducted from completed transactions + documentation returns. This number expresses real growth.
نرصد كافة\"النقاط القابلة للسحب\" لضمان: We monitor all “withdrawal points” to ensure the availability of a parallel bank balance (Backing), which ensures that there is no liquidity gap (Liquidity Gap).
